zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Braithwaite於大約1588年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德安布萊希德時，他的父親Sir Thomas Braithwaite52歲，母親Dorothy Bindloss36歲。他於1617年5月4日與Frances Lawson在英國達勒姆賀沃--斯結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1673年5月4日在英國英格蘭越可爾卡特利可享年86歲，埋葬在英國越可爾卡特利可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Braithwaite于大约1588年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德安布萊希德时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Braithwaite52岁，母亲Dorothy Bindloss36岁。他于1617年5月4日与Frances Lawson在英国達勒姆賀沃--斯结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1673年5月4日在英国英格兰越可爾卡特利可享年86岁，埋葬在英国越可爾卡特利可。

nameMeanings.name: Braithwaite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of the places in Cumbria and Yorkshire named Braithwaite, from Old Norse breithr ‘broad’ + thveit ‘clearing’.

variants.name: Brathwaite
meanings: English: variant of   Braithwaite  . This form of the surname is frequent in Barbados, and in Trinidad and Tobago.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Braithwaite was born about 1588, in Ambleside, Westmorland, England, his father, Sir Thomas Braithwaite, was 52 and his mother, Dorothy Bindloss, was 36. He married Frances Lawson on 4 May 1617, in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 4 May 1673, in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 86, and was buried in Catterick, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Braithwaite est né environ 1588, à Ambleside, Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Braithwaite, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Bindloss, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Frances Lawson le 4 mai 1617, à Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1673, à Catterick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Catterick, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Braithwaite um 1588 in Ambleside, Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Thomas Braithwaite 52 und seine Mutter Dorothy Bindloss 36. Er hat am 4. Mai 1617 in Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England Frances Lawson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1673 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Catterick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Catterick, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Braithwaite è nato il circa 1588 nel Ambleside, Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Braithwaite, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Dorothy Bindloss, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Frances Lawson il 4 maggio 1617, nel Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 4 maggio 1673, nel Catterick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Catterick, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Braithwaiteが約1588年にイギリスウエストモーランドアンブレシドで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Braithwaiteは52歳，母Dorothy Bindlossは36歳であった。1617年5月4日にイギリスダルハムハルウオルス-オン-ティーズでFrances Lawsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1673年5月4日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアカッテリックで86歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアカッテリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Braithwaite(이)가 대략 1588년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 아블레시드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Braithwaite(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Dorothy Bindloss(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1617년 5월 4일 영국 뒤람 허워스--티스에서 Frances Lawson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1673년 5월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 카테릭에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 카테릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Braithwaite nasceu aproximadamente 1588, em Ambleside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Braithwaite, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Dorothy Bindloss, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Frances Lawson em 4 de maio de 1617, em Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1673, em Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Braithwaite родился около 1588 г. в местности эмблесид, вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Braithwaite было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Bindloss, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Frances Lawson 4 мая 1617 г. в местности хурворт-он-тись, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 4 мая 1673 г. в местности каттирикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности каттирикк, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Braithwaite nació aproximadamente 1588, en Ambleside, Westmorland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Braithwaite, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Dorothy Bindloss, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Frances Lawson el 4 de mayo de 1617, en Hurworth-on-Tees, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1673, en Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Catterick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
